title: TagValueResult
description: Result object for a tag value read/write operation. Contains either a value (success) or a code and error (per-item failure).

name.description: Name of the tag (present when using by-name endpoints).

value.description: Current tag value (present on success). Boolean for Bit, number for Int/Float.

code.description: HTTP-like error code for this specific item (present on per-item error).

error.description: Human-readable error message for this specific item (present on per-item error).
